title: L5 template-pack fragment
purpose: D1.6 defines l5 template pack fragment for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D1.6` only; siblings under `D1` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: Before routing workers to S1+ work each pursuit turn, the conductor and Librarian jointly resolve the needed capability—routing, implement, verify, design artifact, or platform promotion—and name the capability id plus target catalog slice in the briefing.

Resolution output feeds [E2.2](E2.2-compose-query-catalog-list-components.md) catalog query and [E2.3](E2.3-compose-rank-script-playbook-skill-facts.md) ranking so compose-first ([B4.3](B4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md)) runs at the Plane E protocol layer before improvisation.

[B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) preflight may short-circuit resolution when `next_action` and the task card already bind a catalog component; otherwise Librarian blocks worker spawn until capability lookup completes.

When resolution names a capability with no catalog match, [E2.5](E2.5-compose-miss-l0-enqueue-promotion.md) enqueues L0 promotion instead of inventing ad hoc behavior; [B4.4](B4.4-divergence-log-when-not-composing.md) logs divergence if compose is bypassed.
If capability remains unresolved after catalog search, pursuit stops at H2 with dual-write—never spawn S1+ workers on a vague improvised prompt.

Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `D1.6`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Scheduler in autopilot workflow: `(steps_total % K) == 0` â†’ platform turn.
playbook-keeper + script extraction skills dequeue promotion items.
Validate `D1.6` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `D1.6` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `D1.6`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D1.6 defines l5 template pack fragment for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system before routing workers to s1+ work each pursuit turn, the conductor and librarian jointly resolve the needed capability—routing, implement, verify, design artifact, or platform promotion—and name the capability id plus target catalog slice in the briefing, then resolution output feeds [e2.2](e2.2-compose-query-catalog-list-components.md) catalog query and [e2.3](e2.3-compose-rank-script-playbook-skill-facts.md) ranking so compose-first ([b4.3](b4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md)) runs at the plane e protocol layer before improvisation.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

L5 is the top rung: template-pack fragments in `template-packs/` that ship with company instantiation—default pipelines, role bindings, verify suites, and catalog components new goals inherit on day one. Fragments export upward from consumer repo promotions ([D4.6](D4.6-platform-work-pack-fragment-export.md)), not one-off edits inside a single product branch.

Pack authors validate fragments against pack schema (Plane F) before publish. An L5 promotion closes the loop started at L0 ephemeral reasoning: the pattern is now organizational capital. Definition-of-done for L5 includes [D6.4](D6.4-platform-done-staleness-node-wired.md) graph wiring so downstream goals know when fragments change.
